title: Kirloskar Electric is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Kirloskar Electric is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Kirloskar Electric in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kirloskar Electric:
Kirloskar Electric is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kirloskar Electric!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
